verses.1: If it had not been the LORD who was on our side,
verses.2: if it had not been the LORD who was on our side,
verses.3: then they would have swallowed us up alive,
verses.4: then the waters would have overwhelmed us,
verses.5: Then the proud waters would have gone over our soul.
verses.7: Our soul has escaped like a bird out of the fowler’s snare.
verses.8: Our help is in the LORD’s name,
